tasks.acceptance: When a new AI agent operator completes onboarding, the system must capture and store W-9 information (legal name, TIN/EIN, business classification, address, signature, date) in a dedicated table with encrypted TIN storage, validate TIN format (SSN: XXX-XX-XXXX or EIN: XX-XXXXXXX), enforce required fields per IRS W-9 instructions, and provide a GET endpoint returning collection status and sanitized W-9 data (TIN masked) for operators who have submitted forms, enabling downstream 1099 generation for the 2026 tax year.
